purpose: Deterministic fast-path routing matrix for ECM/DCM. Any ask matching an entry here MUST skip entity_search and fuzzy_resolve entirely and go directly to query_context -> validate_sql -> query_executor. Match patterns case-insensitively as substrings/phrases.
policy: Check this matrix BEFORE deciding to call entity_search. If ANY pattern matches the user ask and no NAMED entity (company/investor/deal name) is present, follow the fast_path route.

fast_path_intents.label: Citi B&D (Bill and Deliver)
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: Filter BROKER_CODE/SYNDICATE_MEMBER_NAME for Citi match AND BND_BROKER in TRUE set

fast_path_intents.label: Citi Non-B&D
fast_path_intents.negation_rule: non- / non / not before B&D is a SQL filter modifier. NEVER trigger entity_search. Citi here is the broker, not an issuer.
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: Citi in syndicate AND BND_BROKER NOT in TRUE set at Citi index

fast_path_intents.label: Citi Solo
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: REGEXP_COUNT(BROKER_CODE,'\|') = 0 AND Citi token match. ECM only.

fast_path_intents.label: Syndicate roles (lead/joint/passive/co-manager/selling group)
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: REGEXP_LIKE(SYNDICATE_ROLE, role-pattern, 'i'). ECM only.

fast_path_intents.label: Top investors by sector/product/region (no named investor)
patterns: investors who participated in more than
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: Rank by SUM(ALLOCATION) ECM or SUM(AMT) DCM, GROUP BY GPNUM/INVESTOR_NAME, filter by taxonomy
fast_path_intents.metric_clarification: If user says order size: ECM=ALLOCATION, DCM=AMT. Ask once and remember.

fast_path_intents.label: Deals/tranches by currency or denomination
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: WHERE CURRENCY = code or GROUP BY CURRENCY; SUM/MAX TRANCHE_SIZE with dedupe

fast_path_intents.label: Multi-currency deals
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: Subquery COUNT(DISTINCT CURRENCY) > 1 per DEAL_ID. Note: no demand-currency field, CURRENCY is pricing currency.

fast_path_intents.label: Deals/tranches by region
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: TRANCHE_REGION for tranche-level (ECM+DCM); DEAL_REGION for ECM deal-level. Default to TRANCHE_REGION.
fast_path_intents.note: The old REGION column has been removed. TRANCHE_REGION works for ECM and DCM; DEAL_REGION is ECM deal-level only.

fast_path_intents.label: Deals/tranches by sector
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: WHERE SECTOR = normalized_value

fast_path_intents.label: Seniority / bond structure (DCM)
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: DCM: WHERE SENIORITY LIKE '%<value>%'. ECM convertibles: EQUITY_TYPE IN ('Convertible Bonds','Convertible Preferred').

fast_path_intents.label: IPO / Follow-on / Rights Issue (ECM)
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: WHERE OFFERING_TYPE IN ('IPO','FO','Rights Issue'). ECM only.

fast_path_intents.label: ESG / Green / Social / Sustainability (DCM)
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: WHERE ESG_BOND IN ('GREEN','SOCIAL','SUSTAINABILITY'). DCM only.

fast_path_intents.label: Product class / bond type (DCM)
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: WHERE PRODUCT_CLASS = value. DCM only.

fast_path_intents.label: Regulatory category (144A / Reg S / etc.)
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: WHERE REG_CATEGORY LIKE '%value%'. DCM only.

fast_path_intents.label: Investor category classification
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: WHERE INVESTOR_CATEGORY = value (case-insensitive).
fast_path_intents.unsupported_note: These investor sub-categories are NOT valid INVESTOR_CATEGORY values. Tell user the supported values from the schema.

fast_path_intents.label: Meeting type (1x1 / conference / group) — ECM only
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: WHERE MEETING_TYPE_KEY = 'ONE_TO_ONE' or != 'ONE_TO_ONE'. ECM only.

fast_path_intents.label: Deal status filter
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: WHERE DEAL_STATUS = value (case-insensitive).

fast_path_intents.label: Security identifiers in output
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: Include IDENTIFIER_TYPE, IDENTIFIER_VALUE, TICKER in SELECT projection.

fast_path_intents.label: Dealers/banks in sector deals
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: Aggregate SYNDICATE_MEMBER_NAME/BROKER_CODE with SECTOR filter.

fast_path_intents.label: Maturity / tenor filter (DCM)
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: WHERE SECURITIES_MATURITY <= date or TENORS LIKE value. DCM only.

fast_path_intents.label: Coupon type (Fixed / FRN / Zero Coupon)
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: WHERE COUPON_TYPE = value or COUPON_FREQ = value. DCM only.

fast_path_intents.label: Use of proceeds (DCM)
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: WHERE USE_OF_PROCEEDS LIKE value. DCM only.

fast_path_intents.label: Issuer credit ratings (DCM)
fast_path_intents.sql_strategy: WHERE ISSUER_RATINGS LIKE value. DCM only.

metric_clarification_rules.clarification: For ECM, order size maps to ALLOCATION (final allocation). For DCM, order size maps to AMT (indication amount). Ask once if product is unclear.
Demand = ALLOCATION for ECM, AMT for DCM. For highest demand in a deal, confirm: investor with highest final allocation?
Book size = TRANCHE_SIZE (deal/tranche total size, not order level).
Highest share = investor with highest ALLOCATION (ECM) or AMT (DCM). Confirm with user before executing.
